issue.title: Close admin common list-table domain evidence

review_target: WPHX-315.06 copied-package-root plus deterministic bridge-router pattern and WPHX-315 bounded domain closure
key_findings: WPHX-315.06 copies 24 selected upstream files into regenerated oracle and candidate package roots, but the deterministic router emits the observations itself.
The WPHX-315.06 router does not dispatch into mirrored wp-admin route files for the seven HTTP cases.
The mirrored files are package-topology, provenance, and future overlay targets, not executed candidate implementations for this gate.
The evidence is useful as a bridge harness, but must not be treated as broad installed WordPress behavior parity.
accepted_actions: Added separate WPHX-315.06 router observation and package topology claim fields.
Added explicit WPHX-315.06 non-claim fields for mirrored upstream source execution, installed route execution, generated overlays, and durable original-path adapters.
Added a test-harness-only PHP comment to the generated bridge router.
Strengthened WPHX-315.06 receipt summary and non-claims.
Strengthened WPHX-315 domain and parent closure wording around WPHX-315.06.
Filed WPHX-315.08 for a typed HXX/HHX admin markup pilot.
Filed WPHX-315.09 for bridge-router generated-overlay and durable-claim guardrails.
policy: Copied package roots plus deterministic routers may support temporary bridge evidence only.

Copied package roots plus deterministic routers may not support public PHP replacement, durable original-path ownership, whole-file ownership, installed route execution, or broad behavior parity claims by themselves.

Future candidate package divergence needs an explicit generated overlay manifest with overlay paths, source, adapter/compiler evidence, replaced upstream hashes, and unexpected candidate package differences.
Future admin or template-heavy closures should require stronger evidence before relying again on copied package roots plus deterministic router observations.

artifacts.role: human-readable oracle response and accepted decision record
WPHX-315.06 runner updated with narrowed bridge-router claims and test-harness router comment
WPHX-315.06 manifest with package topology and bridge-router observation claims
WPHX-315.06 ownership manifest preserving copied upstream public PHP bridge state
WPHX-315.06 receipt with strengthened scope summary and non-claims
bounded WPHX-315 domain closure receipt preserving WPHX-315.06 non-claims
WPHX-315 parent closure receipt preserving future gates
tracked Beads export with WPHX-315.08 and WPHX-315.09 follow-up issues

follow_up_issues.title: Pilot typed HXX admin PHP markup authoring
Add bridge-router overlay and durable-claim guardrails

claims: The external architecture oracle accepts WPHX-315 as a bounded evidence closure after WPHX-315.06 claim narrowing.
The external architecture oracle accepts copied-package-root deterministic-router gates as temporary bridge evidence when explicit non-claims and future overlay gates are recorded.
The WPHX-315.06 package-root harness is useful for topology, provenance, and future overlay targeting.
non_claims: This receipt does not claim WPHX-315.06 executes mirrored upstream admin route files for its HTTP cases.
This receipt does not claim installed WordPress admin behavior parity.
This receipt does not claim Haxe-owned admin runtime logic.
This receipt does not claim generated public PHP replacement, durable original-path adapter ownership, or whole-file ownership.
This receipt does not claim WPHX-owned admin template markup or typed HXX/HHX admin template compilation.
